6:["$","code",null,{"children":"data*"}]
7:["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Column filtering"}],": Search specific fields"]}]
8:["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Ranking"}],": BM25-based relevance scoring"]}]
9:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Query Syntax"}]
a:["$","$L1f",null,{"code":"# Simple term\nresults = mem.text_search(\"database\")\n\n# Phrase (exact sequence)\nresults = mem.text_search('\"machine learning\"')\n\n# Boolean\nresults = mem.text_search(\"deployment AND kubernetes\")\nresults = mem.text_search(\"python OR golang\")\nresults = mem.text_search(\"database NOT mongodb\")\n\n# Prefix\nresults = mem.text_search(\"auth*\")\n\n# Column filter\nresults = mem.text_search(\"tags:production database\")\n","language":"python"}]
b:["$","h2",null,{"children":"BM25 Ranking"}]
c:["$","p",null,{"children":"FTS5 uses BM25 for relevance scoring:"}]
d:["$","$L1f",null,{"code":"score = log(N / df) * (f * (k1 + 1)) / (f + k1 * (1 - b + b * dl / avgdl))\n","language":"python"}]
e:["$","p",null,{"children":"Where:"}]
f:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"N"}],": Total documents"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"df"}],": Documents containing term"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"f"}],": Term frequency in document"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"dl"}],": Document length"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"avgdl"}],": Average document length"]}],"\n"]}]
10:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Integration with Hybrid Search"}]
11:["$","p",null,{"children":"FTS5 scores are normalized and fused with vector scores:"}]
12:["$","$L1f",null,{"code":"# FTS5 contributes 30% to final score by default\nresults = mem.recall(\n  \"database migration strategy\",\n  text_weight=0.3,\n)\n","language":"python"}]
13:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Performance"}]
14:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Query Type"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Latency"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Use Case"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Single term"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"5ms"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Quick lookup"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Phrase"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"8ms"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Exact match"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Boolean"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"12ms"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Complex filter"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Prefix"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"15ms"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Autocomplete"}]]}]]}]]}]

16:["$","$L1f",null,{"code":"CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE working_fts USING fts5(\n  content,\n  tags,\n  source,\n  content_rowid=rowid\n);\n","language":"sql"}]
17:["$","p",null,{"children":"FTS5 indices are maintained automatically via triggers on the main tables."}]
